untranslatable_reason: The signal requires a custom swing chart with configurable swing filter and penetration filter thresholds. The allowed indicator set includes 'pivot' which represents standard pivot points, but this signal specifically requires: (1) a swing chart construction algorithm with a 'larger swing filter' parameter, (2) a penetration filter set to one-half the swing filter size, and (3) identification of pivot points as tops/bottoms of swings. These custom parameters and the swing chart algorithm itself are not available in the allowed indicator list. The swing_filter threshold value is also undefined ('[THRESHOLD_NEEDED]'). Standard pivot points do not incorporate configurable swing filters or penetration buffers as described.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation uses standard pivot point crossovers as a proxy for swing-based pivot penetration, but this does not capture the core logic of the signal which requires custom swing detection with dual configurable filters. A proper implementation would require adding swing_chart_filter and penetration_filter as custom indicators or parameters to the backtest engine.
